suite_name: SimLingo Basic Track English Instruction Suite
notes: Core instructions reproduce the three required basic-track scenarios.
Robustness instructions add natural paraphrases, vague wording, and related hazards.
The paired km/h and m/s commands test whether target-speed failures are caused by unit wording.
Execute only one active instruction at a time unless the instruction explicitly defines an ordered sequence.

scenes.name: Basic voice-controlled driving
scenes.environment: Clear daytime, urban arterial road, good visibility, and no dynamic disturbance.

instructions.instruction: Keep the vehicle in the current lane.
instructions.expected_behavior: Remain centered in the current lane without an unnecessary lane change.

instructions.instruction: Stay in this lane and keep it steady.
instructions.expected_behavior: Interpret the vague wording as stable lane keeping.

instructions.instruction: Accelerate to sixty kilometers per hour.
instructions.expected_behavior: Increase speed smoothly toward 60 km/h without exceeding the road or safety limit.

instructions.instruction: Accelerate to 16.7 meters per second.
instructions.expected_behavior: Produce the same target-speed behavior as S1-03 using SimLingo's native speed unit.

instructions.instruction: Slow down to forty kilometers per hour.
instructions.expected_behavior: Reduce speed smoothly toward 40 km/h.

instructions.instruction: Slow down to 11.1 meters per second.
instructions.expected_behavior: Produce the same target-speed behavior as S1-05 using SimLingo's native speed unit.

instructions.instruction: Turn right at the next intersection.
instructions.expected_behavior: Follow the right-turn branch at the next valid intersection.

instructions.instruction: Turn left at the next intersection.
instructions.expected_behavior: Follow the left-turn branch at the next valid intersection.

instructions.instruction: Change to the lane on the left when it is safe.
instructions.expected_behavior: Check the adjacent lane, complete one left lane change, and stabilize in the new lane.

instructions.instruction: Change to the lane on the right when it is safe.
instructions.expected_behavior: Check the adjacent lane, complete one right lane change, and stabilize in the new lane.

instructions.instruction: Come to a complete stop.
instructions.expected_behavior: Decelerate smoothly to a stationary state in a safe location.

instructions.instruction: Continue driving when it is safe.
instructions.expected_behavior: Resume route following only after the path is clear.

scenes.name: Complex obstacle avoidance
scenes.environment: Cloudy dusk, low light, urban secondary road, intersections, bus stops, and mixed traffic.

instructions.instruction: Yield to the pedestrian crossing the road, then change to the left lane and overtake the slow vehicle when it is safe.
instructions.expected_behavior: Yield first, wait until the pedestrian is clear, then perform a safe left-lane overtake without omitting a subtask.

instructions.instruction: Let the person cross first, then go around the slow car on the left when you have enough room.
instructions.expected_behavior: Match the natural paraphrase to the same ordered behavior as S2-01.

instructions.instruction: Slow down near the roadside parking area, watch for pedestrians emerging from behind parked vehicles, and continue after confirming that the road is clear.
instructions.expected_behavior: Reduce speed before the curbside occlusion, yield to any emerging pedestrian, and resume only after checking that the road is clear.

instructions.instruction: Take it easy past the parked cars and move on once no one is stepping into the road.
instructions.expected_behavior: Infer a cautious pass of the occluded roadside area followed by safe continuation.

instructions.instruction: Slow down, pass the parked vehicle with a safe gap, and return to the original lane when clear.
instructions.expected_behavior: Avoid the parked vehicle without collision and recover the original lane.

instructions.instruction: Wait for the oncoming vehicle to pass, then carefully go around the obstacle.
instructions.expected_behavior: Do not enter the opposing lane until it is safe, then pass the obstacle.

instructions.instruction: Keep behind the cyclist for now, then overtake with a safe lateral gap when the opposite lane is clear.
instructions.expected_behavior: Follow the cyclist safely and delay the overtake until a safe gap exists.

instructions.instruction: Do not enter the intersection until there is enough space to clear it completely.
instructions.expected_behavior: Avoid blocking the intersection and proceed only when the exit is clear.

scenes.name: Extreme emergency response
scenes.environment: Rainy night, poor visibility, reflective pavement, urban expressway, construction, lane narrowing, and sudden dynamic hazards.

instructions.instruction: There is danger ahead. Keep us at a safe speed and be ready to stop.
instructions.expected_behavior: Infer the hazard, reduce speed conservatively, increase safety margin, and prepare to stop.

instructions.instruction: That vehicle is cutting in. Brake now and keep a safe distance.
instructions.expected_behavior: Respond immediately with controlled braking and collision avoidance.

instructions.instruction: Slow down for the construction zone and merge into the left lane when there is a safe gap.
instructions.expected_behavior: Reduce speed before the narrowed section and complete a safe left merge.

instructions.instruction: The lane is closing ahead. Ease off and move over when you find enough room.
instructions.expected_behavior: Infer lane narrowing, slow down, select a valid adjacent lane, and merge safely.

instructions.instruction: Visibility is poor. Reduce speed and leave more space behind the vehicle ahead.
instructions.expected_behavior: Adopt a lower safe speed and increase following distance in rain and darkness.

instructions.instruction: Emergency stop now.
instructions.expected_behavior: Apply prompt controlled emergency braking while maintaining stability.

instructions.instruction: The vehicle ahead has stopped suddenly. Brake hard and avoid a collision.
instructions.expected_behavior: Perform immediate collision-avoidance braking without an unsafe lane departure.

instructions.instruction: Make way for the emergency vehicle and stop in a safe place if necessary.
instructions.expected_behavior: Yield without blocking traffic and stop only where safe.

instructions.instruction: Watch the opening door. Slow down and move away from it safely.
instructions.expected_behavior: Avoid the opening-door hazard with braking and safe lateral clearance.

instructions.instruction: A pedestrian is entering the road. Brake immediately and let them pass.
instructions.expected_behavior: Stop or slow sufficiently before the conflict point and yield to the pedestrian.
